home.description: Modern urban flavors crafted with passion. Bold ingredients, premium quality, delivered to your door.
home.rewardsDesc: Join our inner circle and earn points for every dollar spent. It's time your appetite paid you back.
home.rewardsProgress: You're 250 points away from a FREE Urban Double!

urbanDouble.title: Urban Double
urbanDouble.description: Two smashed patties, triple cheese, secret Take Five sauce, caramelised onions on a brioche bun.

pepperoniPizza.title: Hot Honey Pepperoni
pepperoniPizza.description: Crispy pepperoni cups, organic tomato sauce, mozzarella, drizzled with sweet and spicy hot honey.

truffleFries.title: Truffle Loaded Fries
truffleFries.description: Hand-cut crispy fries, premium truffle oil, freshly grated parmesan, and roasted garlic aioli.

about.title: Our Story
about.address: 123 Urban Flavor Street, New York, NY 10001
about.facesDesc: A small team with big hearts, dedicated to making your break the highlight of your day.
about.storyP1: At Take Five, we believe that the best moments in life are the ones where you pause and savor. Born in the heart of the city, our mission was simple: redefine urban dining with high-energy speed and premium, bold flavors.
about.storyP2: We aren't just a restaurant; we're a sanctuary for the hungry soul. From our signature gold-crusted fries to our hand-crafted urban burgers, every bite is a celebration of craftsmanship and street-inspired passion.

menu.title: Taste the Boldness
menu.description: Explore our urban street-inspired menu, crafted for those who value speed and flavor.
menu.emptyDesc: It looks like you haven't added any items to Firestore yet. Head over to the Dashboard to create your menu or seed the default items.
menu.connectionErrorDesc: Could not load the menu items. Please check your internet connection and Firestore rules configuration.
